# Copilot Instructions (Refloom)

Follow `AGENTS.md` strictly.

Before writing code, read:
1. `AGENTS.md` — project conventions, build/test commands
2. `ARCHITECTURE.md` — system architecture
3. `docs/adr/` — architecture decision records

## Project Skills

- **branch-strategy**: Refloom のブランチ戦略・PR ワークフロー・リリースフローの定義

## Hard Rules

- All changes require PR to main (no direct push)
- `make ci` must pass before merge
- Use `feature/*` or `fix/*` branch naming
- Check ADRs before changing architecture decisions
